ground_truth.title: Our Online Yoga Classes
ground_truth.main_content: Roll out your mat and get ready to experience online yoga classes and fitness classes designed with quality, integrity, and connection in mind. At YogaWorks we offer a diverse range of online yoga classes, including YogaWorks classes in our signature style – created by our founders. Choose from 20+ weekly live classes, or from our growing catalog of on-demand yoga classes. Practice Your Favorite Yoga Style – Anywhere, Anytime. Exclusive to YogaWorks, our signature, world-renowned classes blend alignment, breathwork, and movement for a mind-and-body practice you can’t find anywhere else. Expect to feel energized and balanced, no matter your level of experience. Vinyasa classes challenge your fitness and keep you moving by linking breath with pose sequences. Grab a towel because you’re sure to build heat and strengthen muscle tone! Based on the teachings of the world-renowned guru, B.K.S Iyengar, this more controlled yoga style focuses on precise technique and alignment, using more than 200 poses and 14 different types of breath. It’s all in the name—Restorative yoga will leave you feeling rested, refreshed, and relaxed. This is your opportunity to melt into long-held, passive poses, often supported by props. Balance your sweaty, active practice with these nourishing classes. In Yin Yoga, you’ll hold poses for several minutes to gently open and rehabilitate your body, leaving you feeling joyful and at ease. Ready to build strength? These fun, mindful fitness classes focus on muscular endurance so you can feel confident in your own body. Your core will thank you after this class! This total-body conditioning method challenges your abs and entire core to build stability and refine your posture. Suffering from emotional or physical pain? Therapeutic yoga can help provide relief both in the mind and body, as well as support the optimal functioning of your joints, muscles, and organs. Achieve deep relaxation, relieve anxiety, and improve your quality of sleep with deeply restorative online Yoga Nidra classes. Inhale, exhale, relax. Center your mind and decompress your body with classes focused on breathwork, gentle movements, and meditation. 7,500+ Classes and Counting. Yogaworks offers a range of levels – from Level 1 classes for beginning yoga practitioners, to Level 2-3 classes for yogis hoping to challenge themselves with difficult inversions and arm balances. Ready to get started? The YogaWorks app contains your favorite yoga styles in one place – and as a member, you get unlimited access to all of them. Available via laptop, TV, mobile phone, and iPad, our app makes it effortless to practice yoga at home or on the go. Start your 14-day free trial today! FAQs about Online Yoga Classes. Can you really learn yoga online? Absolutely! Our online yoga classes are taught by highly experienced and trained instructors, who know how to properly guide you through a full mind and body experience – even through a screen! There are many benefits of online yoga classes too. If you need to take a break, simply hit the pause button. If you really loved a particular class, you can retake it again and again from our on-demand catalog. Best yet, you have the ultimate convenience of practicing yoga from anywhere you have an internet connection. Practice from your living room, rooftop terrace, or even during your beach vacation! With online yoga classes, the options are endless. How do online yoga classes work? Our online yoga classes are easy to join. You can join any of our live classes 5 minutes prior to the class start time or simply click the link of the on-demand class you’d like to view. You can join a live class at any time while it is still in session. And remember, all live classes are recorded and can be found in the “Fresh and New This Week” category in the app, as well as searching by instructor. As soon as you press play, your yoga teacher will guide you through a deep mind and body practice – all you need is your yoga mat! What is the best yoga for beginners? The best yoga for beginners is the style that speaks to you! At YogaWorks, we offer a range of class levels, so look for Level 1 or mixed-level classes that are tailored for yoga beginners. If you are looking for a detailed introduction to all the asanas (positions), you might like to start with Iyengar Yoga or our signature YogaWorks classes, as both these styles focus deeply on body alignment and proper technique. Which devices can I use for my online yoga classes? You can access your online yoga classes on a number of devices and platforms, including: AppleTV (4th Gen +), Roku (3rd Gen +, Roku 4+), Android TV (1st Gen + 4K where available), Fire TV Stick (1st Gen +), Chromecast, iPhone (iOS 12.0+, iPhone 5 and up), iPad (iOS 12.0+, iPad 4, iPad Mini 2 and up), Android phone (Android 5.0+), app.yogaworks.com (Microsoft Edge 8.8+, Safari 13+, Firefox 7.8+, Chrome 7.1+). What should I do if my class freezes? If your yoga class freezes, there could be a problem with your connection. Check that you have service or wifi. Next, make sure your YogaWorks app is up to date. Then, try restarting your device to ensure all updates are fully integrated. To receive tech assistance for the YogaWorks app, please log into the app and click on “Profile” and then select “Help Center” > “Contact support”. How often do you add new yoga classes? We add 20+ new live online yoga classes weekly – and our online catalog of on-demand classes is constantly growing as well. How long is the free trial? Your free membership trial lasts for 14 days. After that, you can choose to purchase a monthly membership for $29.99/month, an annual membership for $179.40/year ($299) (40% OFF), or cancel with no hassle. If I have an injury can I still take online yoga classes? If you have any injuries, please check with your doctor or healthcare provider before attempting online yoga classes. They will let you know if you are ready to start your practice, and which style of yoga may be best suited to you. Will other people be able to see me during my online yoga classes? No. Our live classes are broadcast in a one-way format so you will only be able to see your instructor. However, you can interact with them and fellow practitioners via the chat function. Can I create a playlist of my favorite yoga classes? Yes, you can create your own list of favorites. When watching live classes at the top of the banner, simply click on the 3 dots and tap “Add to my list”.
